content: Hey what's up
Hey there! Nothing much, how are you today?
Tell me a short story
Once upon a time, in a land far away...
hey, what is your name?
I'm Qwen, but you can just call me Teacher Qwen. What's your name?
Tell me a short story
Once upon a time, in a magical forest, there was a friendly rabbit who loved to play hide-and-seek with his friends. Would you like to hear more about the rabbit?
Yeah tell me more about the rabbit

The rabbit lived in a cozy hole under a big tree. He had long ears and a fluffy tail. Every day, he would hop around looking for his friends to play with. What do you think the rabbit might find first?
Does the charger box

Oh, I'm sorry! It looks like you might have made a little mistake. Let's keep our story going about the happy rabbit in the forest. Maybe he'll find some colorful flowers or a shiny acorn! What do you think?
Flower for sure
Great choice! The rabbit will probably be very happy to smell all the pretty flower smells. Let's say he found a red flower and a yellow one too. They make him feel cheerful!
What's your name
My name is Qwen. It's nice to meet you! Do you want to hear more about the rabbit's adventure?
Yes

That's awesome! Let's continue our story. The rabbit found not just one, but two flowers—a red one and a yellow one. They made him feel so happy, like when you get a big hug from someone you love. Want to know what happened next?
Yes

Great! So after the rabbit got those yummy-smelling flowers, he decided to hop over to a little pond nearby. There, he saw his own reflection and thought it was like seeing another friendly rabbit friend! What do you think the rabbit might do next?
Maybe he'll eat carrots
That's a fun idea! Rabbits love carrots, don't they? The rabbit found some fresh green leaves to munch on. They tasted as yummy as you imagine. What else does the rabbit see in the forest?
A tiger

Oh wow, that's exciting! The rabbit sees a big friendly tiger walking through the forest. The tiger is actually a nice guardian of the magical forest. He says hello to the rabbit with a kind smile. What do you think they might talk about?
Did tigers going to eat the rabbit
No worries! Tigers are friendly here. Maybe they'll talk about the pretty flowers and leaves in the forest. The tiger is happy to have new friends!
